note: Fictional on-site evidence ledger for the public showcase (v2.6). Facts only, never scores. All pages, customers, dates, and quotes are invented; URLs are illustrative and do not resolve.

relationship_sentences: Northwind Pay is regulated stablecoin payment infrastructure for the platforms that move money.
Founded in 2021 in New York City, Northwind Pay raised a $48M Series B led by Meridian Capital.
Customer balances are held with a qualified third-party custodian and kept segregated.

facts.name: Pay-ins
facts.claim_sentence_verbatim: Accept stablecoins and settle to fiat, or hold onchain, through hosted checkout, virtual accounts, or a direct API.

facts.name: Payouts
facts.claim_sentence_verbatim: Send single and mass stablecoin payouts with off-ramp to local bank rails in 40+ countries.

facts.name: Conversions
facts.claim_sentence_verbatim: Convert programmatically between fiat and stablecoins at a quoted FX and spread.

facts.name: Sandbox quickstart
facts.claim_sentence_verbatim: Spin up a sandbox and send your first test payout in minutes.

offering_home.note: Only the sandbox/quickstart lives on the docs satellite; it links back to the main domain.

questions_covered: What stablecoins does Northwind Pay support?
Which countries can I pay out to?
Does Northwind Pay hold custody of funds?
questions_missing: How does Northwind Pay pricing work?
Who are typical Northwind Pay customers?
How does Northwind Pay compare to Bridge?

facts.title: 2025 Stablecoin Payouts Benchmark
facts.headline_numbers_verbatim: Median cross-border stablecoin payout settled in 48 seconds across the corridors we measured.

original_research_data.note: One reachable on-domain data asset, but a single dated PDF rather than a recurring HTML report or dataset. No /insights or /research hub exists.

facts.depth_note: Short explainer, product-adjacent, steers to Talk to sales.
Decent primer on the three primitives.
Explainer, not a canonical pillar page.
No own-domain definitional page owns this head term.
No guide; definitional query resolves to a competitor explainer.

comparison_pages.note: No dedicated or multi-rival comparison or alternatives pages found on the domain.

numeric_results_examples_verbatim: Latitude Payments moved marketplace payouts to 41 countries and cut settlement time from 2 days to under a minute.
Tropic Remit reduced payout costs by 38% switching remittance corridors to Northwind.

case_studies.note: Named and numeric, but the newest case study is 14 months old and none ties explicitly to the category head terms.

facts.mix_note: Roughly monthly cadence. About half the last 12 are evergreen or thought-leadership aimed at category buyers; the rest are product changelogs and company news. No dedicated insights or research hub.

facts.quotable_definition_verbatim: Northwind Pay is a single API for stablecoin pay-ins, payouts, and conversions, with custody, licensing, and compliance handled for you.

facts.note: Opens with the one-line definition before any marketing.
Lead sentence is a liftable claim with the 40+ countries figure.
Regulatory summary stated in the first paragraph.

facts.what_it_says_verbatim: Talk to sales for pricing. Get API keys to start building.
facts.directional_only_note: Marketing copy mentions a per-transaction payout fee and an FX spread on conversions, with no minimum on the developer tier, but no structured numbers on any core page.
